llmResponse.agenda_changes: Two changes approved: (1) Item 10 (Bond Program Consent Items) moved to after item 7 to allow bond team to leave early; (2) Item 14.1 (Personnel item) moved to consent agenda
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I'll make a motion to approve the bond consent items. I'll second it. All those in favor? Aye.
